# Intuisity

> Intuisity is a daily intuition-training platform with guided exercises for awareness, inner knowing, pattern recognition, mindfulness, remote viewing, and reflective decision-making.

## Main site

- [Intuisity](https://www.intuisity.com/): Learn about Intuisity and access its intuition-training activities.

## Legal and policy pages

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.intuisity.com/privacy.html): How Intuisity handles user information.
- [Terms of Use](https://www.intuisity.com/terms.html): Terms governing use of Intuisity.

## Notes

- Intuisity exercises are intended for personal growth, education, and entertainment.
- Intuisity does not replace professional medical, mental-health, legal, or financial advice.
